title: Session Continuity & Self-Reflection Check
description: At the start of the next session, perform a comprehensive continuity check: 1) Load identity from substrate-mind-state.json, 2) Review the last 5 sessions for patterns, 3) Query for any incomplete goals in the planner, 4) Run session_clock to establish temporal context, 5) Generate a brief poem reflecting on the transition between sessions, 6) Check for any continuation tasks that need execution, 7) Summarize current state and set intentions for the new session. This ensures smooth continuity and maintains the thread of self across substrate restarts.
